expected_output.email_subject: Follow-Up: Supporting GreenPath Analytics' Expansion
expected_output.email_body: Hi [Recipient], I hope this message finds you well. Following our last conversation on September 15th, I wanted to check in regarding GreenPath Analytics' recent expansion efforts. With the hiring of a Senior Data Scientist and the $15M Series B funding, it seems like an exciting time for your team as you prepare to launch the new carbon emissions tracking tool. I’d love to schedule a 15-minute call next week to discuss how we can support your initiatives. Does Tuesday at 10 AM work for you? If not, feel free to suggest a time that fits your calendar. Looking forward to hearing from you! Best regards, [Your Name]
